subcodes.first_line: The Book of God hath been sent down in truth from the presence of One All-Knowing, All-Wise. Verily, it is the Balance of Justice among all created things and the Sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله نزل بالحق تنزیلا من لدن علیم حکیم انه لقسطاس الحق بین الخلق و الایه
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @Word of God is its own standard, @justice and wrath of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
